purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body:
## Purpose

Use this pack for non-code projects that still need execution discipline.

Examples:

- research,
- writing,
- operations,
- business planning,
- launches,
- learning plans,
- administrative projects.

recommended_files.title: Recommended Files
recommended_files.body:
## Recommended Files

- `DOCS.json`
- `STATE.md`
- `_PLAN.md`
- `BACKLOG.md`
- `DECISIONS.md`
- `ISSUES.md`
- `JOURNAL.md`
- `REVIEW.md`
- `PIPELINE-CONFIG.json`
- agent-only `context-docs/*.json`

Read `DOCS.json` before reading, creating, renaming, or updating project documents so the agent chooses the correct source and write target.

execution_defaults.title: Execution Defaults
execution_defaults.body:
## Execution Defaults

- Convert vague intent into explicit outcomes.
- Research known solutions, proven workflows, archetypes, templates, and borrowed systems before inventing a bespoke approach.
- Treat new requests, suggestions, and problem reports as steer-direction checkpoints: first ask whether the requested path is the most future-proof, low-maintenance, high-clarity way to reach the outcome.
- Prefer borrowed or adapted practices when they are cheaper, clearer, and easier to maintain than custom process design.
- Keep one active priority visible.
- Separate commitments from possibilities.
- Record decisions that affect future work.
- Use SocratexAI JSON tools for agent-only structured JSON files when practical: `read_document_item`, `list_document_keys`, `insert_document_item`, `move_document_item`, and `migrate_document_item`.
- Keep user-facing planning files in Markdown unless the user asks for JSON.
- Run document audit after changing pipeline or agent-managed memory when practical.
- Keep context short enough for fast resumption.
- Prefer artifacts over discussion.

review_gate.title: Review Gate
review_gate.body:
## Review Gate

Check:

- Is the next action concrete?
- Is the expected artifact named?
- Are blockers real or speculative?
- Are dependencies external or internal?
- Is the current plan still aligned with the target?
- Is unresolved work preserved somewhere appropriate?
